name: jarvis-skills
description: Workflow skills for AI-pair-programming and autonomous agent loops, with a focus on bias removal, irreversibility guards, and convergent requirement gating. English public bodies live in plugins/; the maintainer's Korean-persona overlays stay in private/ (gitignored).

plugins.name: jarvis-goal
plugins.description: Goal-driven autonomous execution with built-in irreversibility guard. Port of Anthropic /goal (Claude Code v2.1.139) that automatically pauses for explicit user approval when detecting unrecoverable operations — git push, repo visibility changes, payment, secret exposure, mass data deletion.

plugins.name: jarvis-deep-interview
plugins.description: Convergent Socratic interview that turns vague requirements into a production-grade spec via 8-15 rounds with mathematical ambiguity gating. Inspired by Sorbh/interview-me, adds Contrarian/Simplifier Challenge Mode and JSONL decision log.

plugins.name: jarvis-plan-review
plugins.description: 11-section rigorous design plan review covering problem framing, scope, architecture, security, observability, deployment, performance, reliability, testing, maintainability, and migration. Adapted from gstack /plan-ceo-review for sole-developer + AI-pair-programming workflows.

publishingChecklist.personaScrub: complete (English-only in plugins/, Korean stays in private/)
publishingChecklist.ironLawSampleScrub: complete (generic principles only, no Korean-language incident samples)
